product_spec.required_fact: A real Codex-to-Claude switch must be host-owned, visible, admission/auth/capability revalidated, objective-preserving, and receipted; no provider-private session transfer is implied.

assurance_spec.required_fact: Handoff evidence is an independently observed transition with exact source/target facts; provider prose and fixture evidence cannot establish the owner-real observation axis.

fast_follow_product_spec.required_fact: Receipts and dispositions remain typed and deduplicated, Full Auto uses the existing host lane/lease path, and an unchanged missing transition cannot be rounded green.

issue_state.conclusion: Do not create a duplicate feature issue from one host packet observation. Preserve the miss under parent #8967 and require host/runtime evidence before isolating a product defect.

independent_axes.request_freshness: exact prior checkpoint on current main immediately preceding the observed continuation
independent_axes.mission_continuity: objective and done-condition digests remain unchanged across ordinals 5 and 6
independent_axes.visible_transition_receipt: absent from the host mission packet
independent_axes.duplicate_continuation: no duplicate ordinal or turnRef observed; ordinal 6 is sequential, but it does not satisfy the requested provider transition
independent_axes.exception: Only the host or owner can perform and attest the durable lane transition. Provider-authored text or a separately launched Claude process would not satisfy the criterion.

confirmed: the exact pre-handoff checkpoint exists on main and requests codex-local to fable-local
the next host packet retained the exact runRef, threadRef, objective, and done condition
the next host packet remained on codex-local with previousHandoff=null
not_confirmed: whether the host rejected, ignored, or never interpreted the request
whether a pause/switch/resume transition was attempted
whether the underlying product implementation is defective

local_control.reason: A separate local run would not be the host-authoritative run and would create false evidence.

candidate_disposition.reason: The observation establishes a missing host transition, not a reproducible target-local implementation defect. Existing parent #8967 and assurance #8978 already own the relevant system and proof boundaries.
candidate_disposition.reopen_rule: Create or update a strict bug candidate only if a host transition command/attempt receipt shows that an admitted fable-local switch was requested through the real durable path and the resulting packet still violates FA-AC-58/59.

required_host_evidence_to_clear: a mission packet whose currentLane is fable-local
a non-null previousHandoff bound to this exact runRef and threadRef
source codex-local, target fable-local, actor, timestamp, typed reason, and truncation fact
an independently authored Claude-lane artifact-chain observation
